{{Infobox character
| name = Kathrin
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Valin's true child
| affiliations = Valinhall Traveler
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

''See also: [[Kathrin Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Kathrin is a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]] who has successfully passed [[Valin]]'s tests to earn her power. She is considered one of [[Valin]]'s true children and resides in his [[House]]. In combat, she utilizes various weapons, including a large [[steel]] bow and a massive, reflective hammer, as well as a weapon known as [[Dragon's Fang]]. During conflicts, she has been seen engaging in battle against [[Incarnations]] and has experienced being launched backward by their wrath. Kathrin is characterized by a defiant, blunt, and sometimes irritable personality; she has expressed frustration over being nearly killed by pirates and has shown a lack of concern for formal decorum. Within her group, she is noted as being essential for covering specific defensive points during planned attacks on [[Overlords]].}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|As one of [[Valin]]'s true children who successfully passed his test, Kathrin has established an independent [[life]] for herself. Due to trauma experienced in her youth, she was unable to make it to the camp and instead serves as a person used to cover defense points. She refuses to approach her old master without first engaging in a duel, though she remains someone [[Kai]] might alert if she consents to return.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kathrin]] is someone [[Kai]] might alert if she consents to return.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kathrin]] is one of [[Valin]]'s true children who passed his test.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kathrin]] is a person who has made her own [[life]] and refuses to go near her old master without a duel.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kathrin]] could not make it to the camp due to trauma in her youth.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kathrin]] is a person used to cover defense points.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|As a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]], Kathrin remains alive and is known to possess a [[Dragon's Fang]]. She utilizes an advisor who has the ability to communicate over long distances. During the conflict in [[Elysia]], she engaged in combat against the golems of the [[Ornheim Incarnation]]. Following this battle, Kathrin disappeared.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kathrin]] is still alive.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kathrin]] is supposed to have a [[Dragon's Fang]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kathrin]] has an advisor capable of long-distance communication.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kathrin]] fought the [[Ornheim Incarnation]]'s golems.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kathrin]] disappeared after the battle in [[Elysia]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kathrin]] is a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|She couldn't make it," Kai said softly. "Due to some trauma in her youth, I'm sure,"<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
